thought: Tried: origin and destination were successfully changed to Singapore (SIN) and Tokyo (HND), and the date picker is now open showing March 2026 and April 2026 with a visible month dropdown and a right-arrow control. Failed because: no execution error. Next step: use the visible date-picker next navigation to advance the overlay until June/July 2026 and select the June 9, 2026 departure date first.
python_code:
target_month = "June 2026"

for _ in range(6):
    snapshot = await page.locator("body").aria_snapshot()
    if target_month in snapshot:
        break
    await page.locator('a[href="#"]').last.click()
    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)

snapshot = await page.locator("body").aria_snapshot()
if target_month not in snapshot:
    raise RuntimeError("Could not navigate date picker to June 2026")

await page.get_by_text("June 2026", exact=True).locator("..").get_by_text("9", exact=True).click()
await asyncio.sleep(0.5)

raw_response.python_code:
target_month = "June 2026"

for _ in range(6):
    snapshot = await page.locator("body").aria_snapshot()
    if target_month in snapshot:
        break
    await page.locator('a[href="#"]').last.click()
    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)

snapshot = await page.locator("body").aria_snapshot()
if target_month not in snapshot:
    raise RuntimeError("Could not navigate date picker to June 2026")

await page.get_by_text("June 2026", exact=True).locator("..").get_by_text("9", exact=True).click()
await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
